sections.paragraph: an uncertain root, which if it ever was used, I suspect to have had, like רָנַן, רָנָח the sense of a tremulous and tinkling or creaking sound; Germ. fchmirren, as of a tall tree vibrating in the air; comp. אֹרֶן=תֹּרֶן, אַדְנֹון. أَرَنَ is to be agile, nimble, whence ܐܰܪܳܢܳܐ a wild goat. Hence-
